class.name: JustAMCPTaskManager
class.brief_description: Manages asynchronous background execution tasks securely mapping lifecycle boundaries natively mapping back via the MCP.

method.name: cancel_task
method.description: Safely issues a cancellation token targeting an active task id implicitly mapping cancellation flows explicitly dynamically updating state!

method.name: complete_task
method.description: Mutates an active job bounds globally assigning completed result contents mapping implicitly effectively.

method.name: create_task
method.description: Instantiates an active job definition explicitly safely generating standard initialization state maps effectively mapped natively.

method.name: fail_task
method.description: Forcefully flags existing jobs explicitly generating failure trace strings cleanly across pipelines.

method.name: get_task
method.description: Identifies and resolves active tracking meta mappings fetching live status dynamically globally.

method.name: get_task_result
method.description: Extracts the explicitly passed result block cleanly throwing errors when tasks are actively actively working safely.

method.name: list_tasks
method.description: Returns all mapped jobs handling tracking structures globally directly handling arrays natively.
